Emily started with 25 dogs and added 4 puppies on Thursday plus 1 stray on Friday, bringing the total to 30 dogs before any adoptions occurred. On Saturday, 2 families adopted 3 dogs each, which means 6 dogs left the center, leaving her with a current count of 24 dogs at the [location] on [date].

To manage the remaining animals, the rescue center requires updates to the [inventory] and [budget] for the upcoming [month]. The staff must prepare [supplies] for the new arrivals while ensuring the [donations] cover the care costs for the [animals]. ***
